description_long: This is a medium-sized, bulbous ceramic vase with a wide, flared mouth and a gently tapering neck. The upper portion of the vase is a smooth, matte beige, transitioning into a vibrant, hand-painted band of red with zigzag patterns. Below this, the body features large, colorful floral motifs in red, yellow, green, and blue, outlined in black, giving it a festive and artisanal appearance. The surface appears hard and slightly glossy, typical of glazed pottery. The interior is likely hollow and unglazed, suitable for holding water or decorative items. The overall craftsmanship and vivid colors suggest it is intended as a decorative piece for public or communal urban spaces.
description: A colorful, hand-painted ceramic vase with a flared mouth, beige neck, and vibrant floral motifs on a red and dark background. Its glossy, hard surface and festive design make it ideal for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: The vase displays a prominent red flower with yellow accents and green leaves, with the beige neck and red zigzag band clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view centers on the symmetrical red and yellow floral motif, with the zigzag band and beige neck appearing more uniform and less detailed.
description_view_2: The side view highlights the transition from the floral motif to the dark background, with the red zigzag band and beige neck still visible.
description_view_3: The back view shows less floral detail, focusing more on the red zigzag band and a dark, less decorated section of the vase.
attribute_pattern: floral motifs with geometric zigzag band
